calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 to put Settlement on the record.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn. Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Michael Raifsnider, Esq., for Plaintiff: William Davis, also present in court.
Defendant Hannika Cristante, In Propria Persona also present.
Stipulation for entry of judgment or dismissal filed in court.
Plaintiff owes $9,205.00 in back rent and agreed to vacate by midnight of 3/15/05.
If the Defendant vacates the premises, Plaintiff will waive any and all back rent and damages owing and to dismissed without prejudice.
If Defendant fails to vacate as agreed, Plaintiff is entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendant upon ex-parte application to the court for entry of judgment for restitution and possession of the property at 193 Cook Street, SF, Judgment for all back rent and damages owing and Attorney fees. Forfeiture of the rental agreement. No Securtiy deposit and no last month rent.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of. No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment or appeal, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture and trial by jury. Temporary Restraining Order in place after defendant vacated and not return to the premises. Upon vacating and return the keys, defendant to pick up dismissal signed by counsel and file with the court.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Off Calendar

Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT HANNIKA CHRISTANTE'S Motion To Strike: GRANTED without leave to amend; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JJC/) Reporter: Janet Pond, CSR #5292
